name: codex-game-studio
description: A Codex plugin that turns game ideas, design docs, and playable builds into structured studio workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, design, build, test, and ship indie games with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Game Studio adapts Claude Code Game Studios into a Codex plugin with studio workflows, role lenses, templates, engine modules, design theory, decision protocols, review modes, command-level specs, hook replacements, validation scripts, and GitHub release hygiene.
defaultPrompt: Validate this Codex Game Studio plugin.
Find my current game development phase.
Draft a GDD using the game studio templates.
